title: Danthoniopsis petiolata
taxonomy: Danthoniopsis petiolata is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to Australia and belongs to the genus Danthoniopsis, which is part of the subfamily Danthonioideae. The Danthoniopsis genus is closely related to the genus Danthonia, and both are part of the tribe Danthonieae. Further classification of Danthoniopsis petiolata includes its kingdom as Plantae and its phylum as Magnoliophyta. This species is considered an important part of the Australian flora due to its unique characteristics and distribution.
